title: push: reqwest::Client::new() per notification is wasteful
description: File: src/push.rs:send_push_inner. Each push notification creates a new reqwest::Client (which internally creates a new connection pool, TLS context, etc.). Since notifications fire from spawned tasks at unknown rates, this allocates and tears down a full HTTP client per push. Store a shared Client in AppState or use a module-level LazyLock<reqwest::Client>.
